notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.message: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been removed.

apps.title: Apps
apps.uninstallConfirm: Are you sure you want to uninstall this app?

alertRules.title: Alert Rules
alertRules.thresholdRequired: Set at least one threshold (warn or critical).

projects.title: Projects
projects.noProjects: No projects found in this org.

domains.title: Domains
domains.removeConfirm: Remove routing for this domain? This cannot be undone.

autoheal.title: AutoHeal Center
autoheal.killSwitchHint: When engaged, all automatic autoheal actions are halted platform-wide until disengaged.

members.title: Members
members.subtitle: Manage who can access this organization
members.name: Name
members.removeConfirm: Remove "{name}" from this organization? They will immediately lose access.
members.roleChangeSelfConfirm: Change your own role to "{role}"? You may lose administrative access and be unable to change it back.

metrics.title: Metrics
metrics.subtitle: Host-level time series collected by aegis-agent
metrics.noData: No data in the selected range
metrics.noSeries: No metrics ingested yet. Start aegis-agent to populate this view.

images.title: Images
images.deleteConfirm: Delete image "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
images.pruneConfirm: Remove all unused images, containers, networks and build cache? This cannot be undone.

networks.title: Networks
networks.name: Name
networks.deleteConfirm: Delete network "{name}"? Containers attached to it may lose connectivity. This cannot be undone.

volumes.title: Volumes
volumes.name: Name
volumes.deleteConfirm: Delete volume "{name}"? Any data it holds will be lost. This cannot be undone.

files.title: Files
files.name: Name
files.disabled: File manager is not configured. Set AEGIS_FILE_MANAGER_ROOTS and bind-mount the host directories into the aegis-backend container.
files.notViewable: This file can't be previewed as text — download it instead.
files.directoryHint: This is a directory. Use Rename or Delete below, or click its name to open it.
files.truncated: Showing the first {shown} of {total} entries. Open a deeper subfolder to see the rest.

account.title: Account
account.mismatch: The new passwords do not match.
account.tooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters.

certs.title: Certificates
certs.hint: Live TLS certificate status for your registered domains (probed on :443).
certs.empty: No TLS-enabled domains yet. Add a domain to see its certificate here.

databases.title: Databases
databases.hint: Create and manage databases on Postgres/MySQL/MariaDB apps you installed from the store.
databases.empty: No database apps installed. Install PostgreSQL, MySQL or MariaDB from the App Store to manage databases here.
databases.dropConfirm: Drop database "{db}"? This permanently deletes all its data.

compose.title: Compose
compose.hint: Edit the docker-compose for this app and redeploy. Saving runs `docker compose up -d`.
compose.notCompose: This is a single-container app — it has no compose file to edit.

hostTerminal.title: Host Terminal
hostTerminal.warning: ⚠ This opens a privileged shell with full host access. Owner/admin use only.
hostTerminal.hint: A privileged helper container is started with the host mounted at /host. For a full host shell run:

logs.title: Log Search
logs.hint: Search recent logs across all running containers (built-in aggregation, no external Loki needed).

firewall.title: Firewall
firewall.warning: ⚠ Manages the host firewall (ufw) via a privileged helper. Be careful not to lock yourself out.

websites.title: Websites
websites.hint: Serve a directory as a static/PHP site. Bind a domain and Caddy auto-routes it and issues a Let's Encrypt certificate (point the domain's DNS at this host, ports 80/443 open).
websites.name: Name

apm.title: APM / Distributed Traces
apm.hint: Per-service RED (rate/errors/duration) from OTLP traces. Point apps' OpenTelemetry exporter at /api/v1/telemetry/v1/traces.
apm.empty: No traces yet. Send OTLP traces to /api/v1/telemetry/v1/traces to see services here.

serviceMap.title: Service Map
serviceMap.hint: Auto-discovered service dependency graph from trace parent/child spans.

slo.title: SLOs / Error Budget
slo.hint: Track a success objective per service; SLI is computed from ingested traces.
slo.name: Name
slo.note: SLI is computed over retained trace data (~48h), so long windows are bounded by retention.

loki.title: Loki Logs
loki.hint: Query an indexed, retained log backend with LogQL.
loki.notConfigured: Loki is not configured. Install Loki from the App Store and set AEGIS_LOKI_URL to enable indexed log search (the built-in Logs page needs no setup).

rum.title: Real User Monitoring
rum.hint: Real browser page-load timing (p50/p95) per page from a beacon snippet.
rum.empty: No RUM data yet — embed the beacon snippet in your app.

profiling.title: Continuous Profiling
profiling.hint: CPU/memory flamegraphs via Grafana Pyroscope. Apps need the Pyroscope SDK/agent.
profiling.notConfigured: Pyroscope not configured. Install Pyroscope from the App Store and set AEGIS_PYROSCOPE_URL.

correlation.title: Event Correlation
correlation.hint: Related events grouped by service+resource+type to cut alert noise.

security.title: Security Posture
security.hint: Container misconfiguration scan (CSPM-lite). Deeper CVE scanning: install Trivy from the App Store.

channels.title: Notification Channels
channels.hint: Outbound alert integrations: Slack / Discord / Telegram / webhook.
channels.name: Name
channels.deleteConfirm: Delete channel "{name}"? Alerts will no longer be delivered to it.

statusComponents.title: Status Page Components
statusComponents.name: Component name
statusComponents.deleteConfirm: Delete status component "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

kubernetes.title: Kubernetes
kubernetes.notConfigured: Kubernetes not configured. Set AEGIS_KUBECONFIG to a mounted kubeconfig to view the cluster.

memory.title: Memory Management
memory.hint: Per-container memory usage vs limit, host + swap overview, and set/clear container memory caps.
memory.noLimitHint: No memory limit set — can consume all host RAM.
memory.caveat: Limits apply to the live container and reset if it is recreated (e.g. compose up) — for a permanent cap also set it in the container's compose/run definition. Docker cannot remove a limit from a running container; recreate it without one to go unlimited.

invite.title: Accept your invitation
invite.subtitle: You've been invited to join {orgName}.
invite.expiredDesc: This invitation link is no longer valid. Ask an org admin to send a new one.
invite.invalidDesc: This invitation link could not be verified. It may have already been used.

gitDeploy.title: Deploy from Git
gitDeploy.subtitle: Clone a public repository containing a Dockerfile → build the image → run it as a managed container.
gitDeploy.portsHint: Ports are auto-mapped to free host ports (to avoid conflicts); check the actual ports on the Containers page after deploy.
gitDeploy.started: Build & deploy started (install_id {id}). Check the Apps / Containers page once the build finishes.
